summary: A booking form application that integrates with WhatsApp and Google Sheets via Apps Script to collect appointment data (name, email, phone, date, time, service)
architectural_notes: Uses Google Apps Script as backend webhook to receive POST requests
Apps Script doPost function parses JSON and appends booking data to Google Sheet
Web app deployed with 'Execute as: Me' and 'Who has access: Anyone'
Data fields: timestamp, name, email, phone, date, time, service

existing_features.title: Update the booking form submission endpoint to use the new Google Apps Script web app URL: https://script.google.com/macros/s/AKfycbyNX8QzL8z7as3uaxUlXylX62hNZ4kx7Pt32mQKe9b1HSZCgD0fRgb2CicRVH7qQabvQQ/exec
